languages.text: Джай знает лучше других, что право дышать свободно ценнее всех богатств мира.

traits.locale_text: Джай знает лучше других, что право дышать свободно ценнее всех богатств мира.

languages.text: Jae knows better than anyone that the freedom to breathe is more precious than all the riches in the world.
languages.original_text: Джай знает лучше других, что право дышать свободно ценнее всех богатств мира.

languages.text: Jae sabe mejor que nadie que la libertad para respirar vale más que toda la riqueza del mundo.
languages.original_text: Jae knows better than anyone that the freedom to breathe is more precious than all the riches in the world.

traits.locale_text: Jae sabe mejor que nadie que la libertad para respirar vale más que toda la riqueza del mundo.

languages.text: 婕伊比谁都清楚，自由呼吸的权利比世上所有财富都更加珍贵。
languages.original_text: Jae knows better than anyone that the freedom to breathe is more precious than all the riches in the world.

traits.locale_text: 婕伊比谁都清楚，自由呼吸的权利比世上所有财富都更加珍贵。

languages.text: Jae sait mieux que personne que la liberté de respirer est plus précieuse que toutes les richesses du monde.
languages.original_text: Jae knows better than anyone that the freedom to breathe is more precious than all the riches in the world.

traits.locale_text: Jae sait mieux que personne que la liberté de respirer est plus précieuse que toutes les richesses du monde.

languages.text: Jae, soluma özgürlüğünün dünyadaki tüm zenginliklerden daha değerli olduğunu herkesten iyi biliyor.
languages.original_text: Jae knows better than anyone that the freedom to breathe is more precious than all the riches in the world.

traits.locale_text: Jae, soluma özgürlüğünün dünyadaki tüm zenginliklerden daha değerli olduğunu herkesten iyi biliyor.

languages.text: 息をする自由が、この世のあらゆる富にも勝って尊いことを、ジェイは誰よりもよく知っている。
languages.original_text: Jae knows better than anyone that the freedom to breathe is more precious than all the riches in the world.

traits.locale_text: 息をする自由が、この世のあらゆる富にも勝って尊いことを、ジェイは誰よりもよく知っている。

languages.text: Jae weiß besser als jeder andere, dass die Freiheit, zu atmen, kostbarer ist als alle Reichtümer der Welt.
languages.original_text: Jae knows better than anyone that the freedom to breathe is more precious than all the riches in the world.
